name: PER_ASG_SEC_MATRLZED_CACHE
description: This table will hold materialized cache data for list of assignments a user has access to.

columns.Name: USER_GUID
columns.Comments: This field represents user guid or user session for which data is being cached.

columns.Name: PRIVILEGE
columns.Comments: This field represents user's privilege based on which data is being cached in this table.

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.Comments: This field represents an internal ID for the assignment to which user has access to.

columns.Name: LAST_REFRESH_DATE
columns.Comments: This field represents last time when cache was refreshed.
